title: LRU Cache
description: Design a data structure for Least Recently Used (LRU) cache. Support get and put in O(1) time.

examples.input: LRUCache(2), put(1,1), put(2,2), get(1), put(3,3), get(2)

hints: Use Map to maintain insertion order
On get, move to end (delete and re-add)
On put, if at capacity, remove oldest (first key)
